name: Hydration Reminder
description: Every time this runs, speak a short friendly reminder to drink water. Keep it under 8 words and vary the phrasing each time.

name: Break Reminder
description: It is time for a short break. Speak a brief encouraging message to stand up, stretch, or step away from the screen. Keep it under 10 words and vary the phrasing.

name: Clear takss
description: At the end of the day clear all tasks from my todos that are complete
